    Deprecated API

    • Terminally Deprecated

    • Methods
    • Constructors
    • Terminally Deprecated Elements
      Element
      Description
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.arraybounds.hypergraph.weight.Weight.getNumber()
      Use Weight.number() instead
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.arraybounds.hypergraph.weight.Weight.getType()
      Use Weight.type() instead
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.exceptionanalysis.IntraproceduralExceptionAnalysis(IR, ExceptionFilter<SSAInstruction>, ClassHierarchy)
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.reflection.JavaTypeContext.getType()
      Use JavaTypeContext.type() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.AstCallGraph.AstFakeRoot(MethodReference, IClass, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.AstCallGraph.AstFakeRoot(MethodReference, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.AstCallGraph.ScriptFakeRoot(MethodReference, IClass, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.AstCallGraph.ScriptFakeRoot(MethodReference, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.CrossLanguageCallGraph.CrossLanguageFakeRoot(IClass, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.ipa.callgraph.CrossLanguageCallGraph.CrossLanguageFakeRoot(IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getCallGraph()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.callGraph() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getFlowGraph()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.flowGraph() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getPointerAnalysis()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.pointerAnalysis() instead
      com.ibm.wala.classLoader.Language.getFakeRootMethod(IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      Use Language.getFakeRootMethod(IClassHierarchy, IAnalysisCacheView); the options parameter is unused.
      com.ibm.wala.core.java11.Java9AnalysisScopeReader
      Use AnalysisScopeReader; support for jrt entries is now built in.
      com.ibm.wala.core.util.ssa.InstructionByIIndexWrapper.getInstruction()
      Use InstructionByIIndexWrapper.instruction() instead
      com.ibm.wala.dalvik.classLoader.DexConstants
      replace ACC_XXX with AccessFlags.XXX.getValue() and replace VALUE_XXX with ValueType.XXX
      com.ibm.wala.dalvik.classLoader.DexConstants.ACC_ABSTRACT

      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.flowgraph.PointerKeyAndCallSite.getCallSiteRef()
      Use PointerKeyAndCallSite.callSiteRef() instead
      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.flowgraph.PointerKeyAndCallSite.getKey()
      Use PointerKeyAndCallSite.key() instead
      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.util.MemoryAccess.getInstructionIndex()
      Use MemoryAccess.instructionIndex() instead
      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.util.MemoryAccess.getNode()
      Use MemoryAccess.node() instead

      com.ibm.wala.ide.util.JdtUtil.findJavaMethodInWorkspaceBrokenForInnerClasses(String)
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.AbstractRootMethod(MethodReference, IClass, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.AbstractRootMethod(MethodReference, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.FakeRootMethod(IClass, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.FakeWorldClinitMethod(IClass, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      to remove unused options parameter
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.addBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, AnalysisScope, ClassLoader, XMLMethodSummaryReader, IClassHierarchy)
      Method will be replaced. Please

      Use Util.addBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, ClassLoader, XMLMethodSummaryReader, IClassHierarchy) instead

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.addBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, AnalysisScope, ClassLoader, String, IClassHierarchy)
      This method is being replaced. Please

      Use Util.addBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, ClassLoader, String, IClassHierarchy) instead

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.addDefaultBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, AnalysisScope, ClassLoader, IClassHierarchy)

      Use Util.addDefaultBypassLogic(AnalysisOptions, ClassLoader, IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeMainEntrypoints(AnalysisScope, IClassHierarchy)

      Use Util.makeMainEntrypoints(IClassHierarchy) instead

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeMainEntrypoints(AnalysisScope, IClassHierarchy, String)

      Use Util.makeMainEntrypoints(IClassHierarchy, String)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeMainEntrypoints(AnalysisScope, IClassHierarchy, String[])
      Please

      Use Util.makeMainEntrypoints(IClassHierarchy, String[])

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeNCFABuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisScope)

      Use Util.makeNCFABuilder(int, Language, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView,IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeNObjBuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisScope)

      Use Util.makeNObjBuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeRTABuilder(AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisScope)

      Use Util.makeRTABuilder(AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeVanillaNCFABuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisScope)

      Use Util.makeVanillaNCFABuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.impl.Util.makeVanillaNObjBuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy, AnalysisScope)

      Use Util.makeVanillaNObjBuilder(int, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      use Util.makeVanillaZeroOneCFABuilder(Language, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      Use Util.makeVanillaZeroOneContainerCFABuilder(AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      Use Util.makeZeroCFABuilder(Language, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView, IClassHierarchy)

      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.AllocationSite.getMethod()
      Use AllocationSite.method() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.AllocationSite.getSite()
      Use AllocationSite.site() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.cfa.AllocationString.getAllocationSites()
      Use AllocationString.allocationSites() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.ConcreteTypeKey.getType()
      Use ConcreteTypeKey.type() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.FilteredPointerKey.SingleClassFilter.getConcreteType()
      Use FilteredPointerKey.SingleClassFilter.concreteType() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.callgraph.propagation.InstanceKey.getConcreteType()
      Use InstanceKey.concreteType() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ipa.cfg.exceptionpruning.FilteredException.getException()
      Use FilteredException.exception() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeBT.Constants.MAYBE
      use AnalysisResult.MAYBE.ordinal() + 1
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeBT.Constants.NO
      use AnalysisResult.NO.ordinal() + 1
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeBT.Constants.YES
      use AnalysisResult.YES.ordinal() + 1
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeBT.tools.MethodOptimizer
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeBT.tools.MethodOptimizer(MethodData, MethodEditor)
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.getClassName()
      Use ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.className() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.getDescriptor()
      Use ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.descriptor() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.getElementName()
      Use ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.elementName() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.getKind()
      Use ConstantPoolParser.ReferenceToken.kind() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.getFrameType()
      Use StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.frameType() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.getLocalTypes()
      Use StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.localTypes() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.getOffset()
      Use StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.offset() instead
      com.ibm.wala.shrike.shrikeCT.StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.getStackTypes()
      Use StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.stackTypes() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ssa.SSACheckCastInstruction.getDeclaredResultType()
      the system now supports multiple types, so this accessor will not work for all languages.
      com.ibm.wala.types.ClassLoaderReference.getLanguage()
      Use ClassLoaderReference.language() instead
      com.ibm.wala.types.ClassLoaderReference.getName()
      Use ClassLoaderReference.name() instead
      com.ibm.wala.types.ClassLoaderReference.getParent()
      Use ClassLoaderReference.parent() instead
      com.ibm.wala.types.Selector.getDescriptor()
      Use Selector.descriptor() instead
      com.ibm.wala.types.Selector.getName()
      Use Selector.name() instead

      Use WelshPowell.ColoredVertices.colors() instead
      com.ibm.wala.util.graph.traverse.WelshPowell.ColoredVertices.getNumColors()
      Use WelshPowell.ColoredVertices.numColors() instead
      com.ibm.wala.util.graph.traverse.WelshPowell.ColoredVertices.isFullColoring()
      Use WelshPowell.ColoredVertices.fullColoring() instead

      Use IntPair.x() instead
      com.ibm.wala.util.intset.IntPair.getY()
      Use IntPair.y() instead

      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider
      Replaced by TaintTransferFunctions.
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider(IFDSTaintDomain<E>, ISupergraph<BasicBlockInContext<E>, CGNode>, PointerAnalysis<InstanceKey>)
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider.getCallFlowFunction(BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>)
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider.getCallNoneToReturnFlowFunction(BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>)
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider.getCallToReturnFlowFunction(BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>)
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider.getReturnFlowFunction(BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>, BasicBlockInContext<E>)
      org.scandroid.flow.functions.IFDSTaintFlowFunctionProvider.ReturnDefUse
      org.scandroid.spec.MethodNamePattern.getClassName()
      Use MethodNamePattern.className() instead
      org.scandroid.spec.MethodNamePattern.getDescriptor()
      Use MethodNamePattern.descriptor() instead
      org.scandroid.spec.MethodNamePattern.getMemberName()
      Use MethodNamePattern.memberName() instead
    • Deprecated Interfaces
      Interface
      Description
      com.ibm.wala.dalvik.classLoader.DexConstants
      replace ACC_XXX with AccessFlags.XXX.getValue() and replace VALUE_XXX with ValueType.XXX

      Class
      Description
      com.ibm.wala.core.java11.Java9AnalysisScopeReader
      Use AnalysisScopeReader; support for jrt entries is now built in.

      Method
      Description
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.arraybounds.hypergraph.weight.Weight.getNumber()
      Use Weight.number() instead
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.arraybounds.hypergraph.weight.Weight.getType()
      Use Weight.type() instead
      com.ibm.wala.analysis.reflection.JavaTypeContext.getType()
      Use JavaTypeContext.type() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getCallGraph()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.callGraph() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getFlowGraph()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.flowGraph() instead
      com.ibm.wala.cast.js.callgraph.fieldbased.FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.getPointerAnalysis()
      Use FieldBasedCallGraphBuilder.CallGraphResult.pointerAnalysis() instead
      com.ibm.wala.classLoader.Language.getFakeRootMethod(IClassHierarchy, AnalysisOptions, IAnalysisCacheView)
      Use Language.getFakeRootMethod(IClassHierarchy, IAnalysisCacheView); the options parameter is unused.
      com.ibm.wala.core.util.ssa.InstructionByIIndexWrapper.getInstruction()
      Use InstructionByIIndexWrapper.instruction() instead
      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.flowgraph.PointerKeyAndCallSite.getCallSiteRef()
      Use PointerKeyAndCallSite.callSiteRef() instead
      com.ibm.wala.demandpa.flowgraph.PointerKeyAndCallSite.getKey()
      Use PointerKeyAndCallSite.key() instead

      Use MemoryAccess.instructionIndex() instead

      Use MemoryAccess.node() instead

      com.ibm.wala.properties.WalaProperties.getWalaHomeDir()
      because when running under eclipse, there may be no such directory. Need to handle that case.

      Use StackMapConstants.StackMapFrame.stackTypes() instead
      com.ibm.wala.ssa.SSACheckCastInstruction.getDeclaredResultType()
      the system now supports multiple types, so this accessor will not work for all languages.
